body:
Seen here: https://github.com/coder/coder/actions/runs/7101380348/job/19329370549?pr=11033

Logs:
```
goleak: Errors on successful test run: found unexpected goroutines:
[Goroutine 18625 in state IO wait, with internal/poll.runtime_pollWait on top of the stack:
goroutine 18625 [IO wait]:
internal/poll.runtime_pollWait(0x7f3bede7c028, 0x72)
	/opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.20.11/x64/src/runtime/netpoll.go:306 +0x89
internal/poll.(*pollDesc).wait(0xc007432d80?, 0xc0086e1900?, 0x0)
	/opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.20.11/x64/src/internal/poll/fd_poll_runtime.go:84 +0x32
internal/poll.(*pollDesc).waitRead(...)
	/opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.20.11/x64/src/internal/poll/fd_poll_runtime.go:89
internal/poll.(*FD).Read(0xc007432d80, {0xc0086e1900, 0x4d0, 0x4d0})
	/opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.20.11/x64/src/internal/poll/fd_unix.go:167 +0x299
net.(*netFD).Read(0xc007432d80, {0xc0086e1900?, 0x7f3bed796668?, 0x7f3c30ad0f18?})
	/opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.20.11/x64/src/net/fd_posix.go:55 +0x29
net.(*conn).Read(0xc008b498c0, {0xc0086e1900?, 0x27b9a40?, 0x1?})
	/opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.20.11/x64/src/net/net.go:183 +0x45
net.dnsPacketRoundTrip({_, _}, _, {{{0x74, 0x77, 0x6f, 0x2e, 0x70, 0x72, 0x6f, ...}, ...}, ...}, ...)
	/opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.20.11/x64/src/net/dnsclient_unix.go:108 +0x14a
net.(*Resolver).exchange(_, {_, _}, {_, _}, {{{0x74, 0x77, 0x6f, 0x2e, 0x70, ...}, ...}, ...}, ...)
	/opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.20.11/x64/src/net/dnsclient_unix.go:187 +0x534
net.(*Resolver).tryOneName(_, {_, _}, _, {_, _}, _)
	/opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.20.11/x64/src/net/dnsclient_unix.go:277 +0x46b
net.(*Resolver).goLookupIPCNAMEOrder.func3.1(0xd450?)
	/opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.20.11/x64/src/net/dnsclient_unix.go:653 +0x85
created by net.(*Resolver).goLookupIPCNAMEOrder.func3
	/opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.20.11/x64/src/net/dnsclient_unix.go:652 +0x16c

 Goroutine 18661 in state chan receive, with net.(*Resolver).lookupIPAddr.func2 on top of the stack:
goroutine 18661 [chan receive]:
net.(*Resolver).lookupIPAddr.func2(0x6d228a?, 0xc008bc32c0)
	/opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.20.11/x64/src/net/lookup.go:330 +0x25
created by net.(*Resolver).lookupIPAddr
	/opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.20.11/x64/src/net/lookup.go:347 +0x865

```
title: flake: goleak sometimes flags goroutines relating to DNS lookups as leaks
